2604.18486.title: OneVL: One-Step Latent Reasoning and Planning with Vision-Language Explanation
2604.18486.paper_summary: Chain-of-Thought (CoT) reasoning has become a powerful driver of trajectory prediction in VLA-based autonomous driving, yet its autoregressive nature imposes a latency cost that is prohibitive for real-time deployment. Latent CoT methods attempt to close this gap by compressing reasoning into continuous hidden states, but consistently fall short of their explicit counterparts. We suggest that this is due to purely linguistic latent representations compressing a symbolic abstraction of the world, rather than the causal dynamics that actually govern driving. Thus, we present OneVL (One-step latent reasoning and planning with Vision-Language explanations), a unified VLA and World Model framework that routes reasoning through compact latent tokens supervised by dual auxiliary decoders. Alongside a language decoder that reconstructs text CoT, we introduce a visual world model decoder that predicts future-frame tokens, forcing the latent space to internalize the causal dynamics of road geometry, agent motion, and environmental change. A three-stage training pipeline progressively aligns these latents with trajectory, language, and visual objectives, ensuring stable joint optimization. At inference, the auxiliary decoders are discarded and all latent tokens are prefilled in a single parallel pass, matching the speed of answer-only prediction. Across four benchmarks, OneVL becomes the first latent CoT method to surpass explicit CoT, delivering state-of-the-art accuracy at answer-only latency, and providing direct evidence that tighter compression, when guided in both language and world-model supervision, produces more generalizable representations than verbose token-by-token reasoning. Project Page: https://xiaomi-embodied-intelligence.github.io/OneVL
2604.18486.paper_summary_zh: Chain-of-Thought (CoT) 推理已成為基於 VLA 的自動駕駛中軌跡預測的一個強大驅動力，但其自回歸特性帶來的延遲成本對於實時部署來說是不可接受的。<lb/>潛在 CoT 方法試圖通過將推理壓縮為連續的隱藏狀態來縮小這一差距，但始終未能達到其顯式對應物的效果。<lb/>我們認為這是因為純語言的潛在表示壓縮了世界的符號抽象，而不是實際支配駕駛的因果動力學。<lb/>因此，我們提出了 OneVL（帶有視覺-語言解釋的一步潛在推理和規劃），這是一個統一的 VLA 和世界模型框架，通過由雙重輔助解碼器監督的緊湊潛在標記來引導推理。<lb/>除了重建文本 CoT 的語言解碼器外，我們還引入了一個視覺世界模型解碼器，用於預測未來幀標記，迫使潛在空間內化道路幾何、代理運動和環境變化的因果動力學。<lb/>一個三階段的訓練管道逐步將這些潛在表示與軌跡、語言和視覺目標對齊，確保穩定的聯合優化。<lb/>在推理過程中，輔助解碼器被丟棄，所有潛在標記在一次並行傳遞中預填充，達到僅回答預測的速度。<lb/>在四個基準測試中，OneVL 成為第一個超越顯式 CoT 的潛在 CoT 方法，在僅回答延遲下提供最先進的準確性，並直接證明了在語言和世界模型監督的指導下，更緊湊的壓縮產生的表示比冗長的逐標記推理更具可泛化性。<lb/>項目頁面：https://xiaomi-embodied-intelligence.github.io/OneVL
2604.18486.author: Jinghui Lu et.al.
